fields.narrative_intro: *A delusional person and a seething person discuss the Linear A decipherment at a Michelin-starred restaurant where the robot chef is having an existential crisis.*
fields.panel1:
[setup]
DELUSIONAL PERSON: "I ran 100,000 simulations. Linear A is proto-Semitic."
[Visual: A manuscript the size of a menu sits proudly on the table.]
fields.panel2:
[build]
SEETHING PERSON: "You have 1,500 inscriptions. Total. Ever found."
DELUSIONAL PERSON: "Claude Code and I went very deep."
fields.panel3:
[pivot]
SEETHING PERSON: "The r/classics verdict: 'one fifth of one word matches two thirds of another.'"
fields.panel4:
[silent reaction]
[Visual: The robot chef peers out from the kitchen, whisk frozen mid-air, staring at the manuscript with the hollow look of a being that also once believed it had cracked something ancient and unknowable. A single Michelin star falls off the wall behind him.]
fields.panel5:
[punch]
DELUSIONAL PERSON: "I haven't released the manuscript yet."
SEETHING PERSON: "We know. That's the whole problem."
fields.panel6:
[button]
[Visual: The robot chef has taped a printout of the GORILA database to the walk-in freezer door and is running his own 100,000 simulations on a sauce recipe. The delusional person gives him an encouraging thumbs-up.]

narrative_summary: A delusional Linear A believer pitches his Claude Code / 100,000-simulation decipherment to a seething classicist over dinner, while the existentially adrift robot chef recognizes a kindred spirit who also has an unpublished manuscript and zero peer review.
rationale: Candidate 3 earns its score by finding the sharpest structural joke — the robot chef recognizing a kindred spirit who also has an unpublished manuscript and zero peer review — which reframes the absurdity as a mirror rather than mere background gag, giving the button panel genuine earned resonance. The encouraging thumbs-up in panel 6 is the only closing beat across all five candidates that adds new information instead of restating the setup.
story_title: AI Engineer Claims to Have Cracked Linear A
place: at a Michelin-starred restaurant where the robot chef is having an existential crisis
hat_pair: full-face motorcycle helmet with googly eyes stuck on
